entities.fisherman: an old fisherman in a yellow raincoat
entities.boy: a boy sitting on a crate

scenes.title: The Harbor
scenes.background_prompt: A small fishing harbor with wooden docks, moored boats, coiled ropes, stacked crates, and calm water reflecting the sky. Overcast day. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A small fishing harbor on an overcast day. An old fisherman in a bright yellow raincoat and rubber boots stands on the wooden dock, pulling a thick rope attached to a small blue fishing boat. A boy in a gray hoodie and jeans sits on a wooden crate near the edge of the dock, dangling his legs and looking out at the water with a thoughtful expression. A brown pelican with a large beak perches on a wooden post at the end of the dock, its wings folded. Coiled ropes, lobster traps, and a red bucket sit on the dock. The calm water reflects the gray sky and the hulls of several moored boats. Seagulls circle in the distance.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place fisherman on the dock (center-left), standing and pulling a rope attached to the blue boat, facing left. Place boy on a wooden crate near the dock edge (right), sitting with legs dangling, looking out at the water. Place pelican on the wooden post at the far end of the dock, wings folded, head tilted.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left corner of the scene, a grassy bank is covered with small white flowers and green clover. On the adjacent wooden dock, a stack of three wooden crates sits with one crate positioned on top of two others. To the right of these crates, a fisherman stands on the wooden planks. He has a full grey beard and mustache and is dressed in a reddish-brown knit beanie, a thick brown textured sweater, dark green trousers, and grey rubber boots. He is leaning back, pulling a thick rope that is attached to a green rowboat floating in the water. Near his feet on the dock lies a large, neat coil of rope. Further to the right on the dock, a boy sits on a single wooden crate. The boy has brown hair and wears a blue baseball cap, a sweater with horizontal yellow, green, and blue stripes, brown pants, and brown boots. He wears a small brown backpack and is looking toward the right side of the image. In the bottom right corner, three wooden barrels with metal bands are grouped together. Behind the boy, a green rowboat containing two wooden oars and a net floats in the water. To the left of this boat, a blue rowboat is tied to the dock with a rope. Further out in the water, there are two more green rowboats, one of which has a single oar resting across its seats. In the background on the left, several quaint houses with stone and timber-frame walls, brown shingled roofs, and small windows are nestled among a dense forest of green and orange-brown trees. A long wooden pier extends from the shore on the right side of the image into the blue water. At the far end of this pier, a pelican with white and grey feathers and a large orange beak stands facing left. In the far distance, rolling green hills and blue mountains are visible under a light blue sky filled with soft, fluffy white clouds, indicating a clear, bright day.
